Localization.Description: Possible exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2023-42793 in TeamCity. This vulnerability allows attackers to create bearer tokens for any user and manage TeamCity users, agents, and projects.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Rogue request for token "{object.name}" from host {src.host} for a user with ID {object.account.id} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} sent a rogue request for token "{object.name}" from host {src.host} for a user with ID {object.account.id} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} sent a rogue request for token "{object.name}" from host {src.host} for user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Rogue request for token "{object.name}" from host {src.host} for user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
